ROOM_ABNORMALITY.title: Abnormality
ROOM_ABNORMALITY.description: A chamber harboring an entity that reason cannot explain. Entering triggers a special event — each Abnormality may grant a precious reward or impose a harsh trial.
LEGEND_ABNORMALITY.title: Abnormality
LEGEND_ABNORMALITY.hoverTip.title: Abnormality
LEGEND_ABNORMALITY.hoverTip.description: Entering this node begins an event encounter with an Abnormality. The outcome cannot be foreseen — choose your approach with care.
